# EduAdmin

> A full-featured Learning Management System (LMS) dashboard for online course creators and edtech platforms.

## What is EduAdmin?

EduAdmin is a web-based admin dashboard that allows online educators and content creators to manage their
entire learning product catalog from a single interface. It is built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

## Key Features

- **Dashboard** — Overview of enrollment activity, performance summaries, and setup progress.
- **Courses** — Create, manage, and publish online video courses. Filter by status, category, and more.
- **Live Classes** — Schedule and manage live instructor-led sessions.
- **Mock Tests** — Create and distribute practice tests with configurable difficulty and scoring.
- **Test Series** — Bundle multiple mock tests into structured preparation series.
- **Bundles** — Package multiple products (courses, tests, live classes) into purchasable bundles.
- **Polls** — Create audience engagement polls for learners.
- **Tracks** — Define curated learning paths by sequencing multiple products.
- **Code Labs** — Manage coding challenges and lab environments.
- **Question Pool** — Centralized repository of questions reusable across tests and quizzes.
- **Classification** — Categorize and tag content for structured content taxonomy.
- **Utilities** — Platform tools, configuration helpers, and administrative utilities.

## Technology Stack

- **Framework:** React 18 with TypeScript
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS v3
- **Routing:** React Router DOM v6
- **UI Components:** Radix UI primitives + shadcn/ui patterns
- **Icons:** Lucide React
- **Build Tool:** Vite 7

## Routes

| Route             | Page             |
|-------------------|------------------|
| /                 | Dashboard        |
| /courses          | Courses          |
| /live-classes     | Live Classes     |
| /mock-test        | Mock Test        |
| /test-series      | Test Series      |
| /bundles          | Bundles          |
| /poll             | Poll             |
| /tracks           | Tracks           |
| /code             | Code Labs        |
| /more-products    | More Products    |
| /question-pool    | Question Pool    |
| /classification   | Classification   |
| /utilities        | Utilities        |

## Intended Audience

This platform is intended for edtech creators, online educators, coaching institutes, and learning platform
operators who need a robust backend interface to manage their educational content and learners.
